# `api.partners.search`

> `POST /partner/search` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.partners.search(*, data: PartnerSearchRequest | dict) -> list[Partner]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab partners search [--data ...]
```

POST /partner/search.

Args:
    data: Partner search payload.
        Accepts a :class:`PartnerSearchRequest` instance or a dict.

Request model: :class:`PartnerSearchRequest`

## Request body — `PartnerSearchRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `searchText` | `Optional[str]` | no | Search query |
| `page` | `Optional[int]` | no | Page number |
| `pageSize` | `Optional[int]` | no | Results per page |

## Response

Returns a list of `List[Partner]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner name |
| `type` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner type |
| `contactInfo` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Contact information |
